original_prompt: 给这个和田玉手串做一张淘宝主图，要求多添加一点元素充实画面
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, Zen Luxury Photography style. The minimalist circular bracelet composed of approximately 21 spherical beads of pale celadon jade (Subject Lock) is placed centrally on a textured light beige travertine stone slab.
[Props]: To enrich the scene, include a vintage ceramic tea cup with faint steam rising on the side, and a blurred branch of green bamboo or dried wood in the background to create depth. A piece of light silk fabric flows through the corner.
[Background]: Soft, warm neutral tones with a high-end depth of field. 
Lighting is [Studio Softbox with Rim Light], highlighting the vitreous luster and semi-translucent material of the jade beads."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Left Text Focus, Center Product.
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “和田玉·温润臻品”. Position: [Top Left]. Style: [3D Serif Font in Dark Green or Gold, Elegant].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “细腻油润 颗颗精选”. Style: [Clean and sharp, smaller size].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “顺丰包邮 · 赠精美礼盒”. Style: [Slim Gold-bordered Capsule].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “国检证书”. Style: [Translucent Glass Seal]."
layout_logic: Since the product is a circular loop, centering it creates a stable visual anchor. To 'enrich' the scene without cluttering, place the props (tea, bamboo, stone textures) in the corners or background layers (depth of field). The text should be placed in the Top-Left negative space (the 'F-pattern' reading zone) to balance the visual weight of the props on the bottom-right.
